geocode.source: Brooklyn: New Lots Avenue - Shepherd Avenue

original_title: Brooklyn: New Lots Avenue - Shepherd Avenue
text:
New Lots Avenue, at the N. E. corner of Shepherd Avenue, showing the Van Brunt House, considered one of the oldest in this section of the borough. It was also known as the Hopkins Farmhouse and the Boerum House.

About 1922

Eugene L. Armbruster Collection
